title: Expose swarm event member metadata
goal: Implement a small issue #13 observability slice: enrich structured swarm events with member run_id/role/status/working_dir metadata so debugging/recovery can correlate events to a run/worktree without reading raw swarm state.
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: SwarmEvent carries optional run_id, role, status, and working_dir metadata when the event is recorded for a known member
events:recent/events:since/events:subscribe include the new metadata fields when present
Existing event consumers remain backward-compatible when metadata is absent
Focused tests and cargo check/selfdev build pass
failureTaxonomy: Breaking existing debug event JSON shape by removing fields
Changing swarm event recording semantics or event filtering
Adding metadata that becomes stale before event record time without tests
notes: Keep this additive. Do not change event filtering, cleanup, await, spawn, or role assignment behavior. Only record and expose metadata when available.
